data.title: Steak ’n Shake Adds $5M in Bitcoin as Sales Jump on Lightning Payments
data.description:
The American fast-food chain Steak ’n Shake has expanded its Bitcoin exposure, adding $5 million worth of Bitcoin to its balance sheet and lifting its Strategic Bitcoin Reserve to roughly $15 million.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/steak-n-shake-adds-5m-in-bitcoin-as-sales-jump-on-lightning-payments/

data.title: U.S. Dollar Index Rises Amid Strong Dollar Policy
data.description: The U.S. Dollar Index experienced a short-term increase, currently up by 0.8% at 96.56 points. According to PANews, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent stated that the United States consistently adheres to a strong dollar policy. He emphasized that the U.S. will "absolutely not" intervene in the dollar-yen exchange rate. Additionally, a reduction in the trade deficit is expected to bolster the dollar.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Reaffirms Strong Dollar Policy
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant has expressed views on several key issues. According to ChainCatcher, he reiterated the United States' long-standing commitment to a strong dollar policy and clearly stated that there would be no intervention in the foreign exchange market to support the yen. Besant also noted that a reduction in the trade deficit is expected to boost the dollar. Additionally, he discussed the Federal Reserve's monetary policy stance, emphasizing that interest rate decisions are made independently by the Federal Reserve.

data.title: The AI ​​industry seeks to replicate the success of cryptocurrency lobbying and invests in the midterm elections.
data.description: The AI ​​industry is mimicking the lobbying strategies employed by the cryptocurrency industry during the 2024 election cycle, aiming to influence the 2026 midterm elections and AI legislation through super PACs. Leading the Future, a super PAC established last summer, has garnered support from Silicon Valley investors such as Marc Andreessen, Ben Horowitz, Greg Brockman, Joe Lonsdale, and Perplexity. Meta also launched a super PAC focused on AI regulation late last year. Despite polls by Pew Research and Gallup showing retail investors' concerns about the negative impacts of AI on jobs and privacy, AI super PACs plan to promote innovation policies by supporting pro-AI candidates. Brian Rice, Meta's VP of Public Policy, stated that the company will support state-level candidates who champion US technology leadership. Furthermore, LTF has publicly opposed New York State's RAISE Act, arguing that such regulations would undermine the US's leading position in AI. Currently, despite Trump's attempts to deregulate through executive orders, the RAISE Act was signed into law by New York Governor Kathy Hochul in December. (CNBC)

data.title: Circle Launches Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol on Mainnet
data.description: Circle has announced the launch of its cross-chain transfer protocol (CCTP) on the mainnet. According to Foresight News, this new feature aims to enhance the speed of end-to-end transmissions, reduce operational costs and third-party risks, and improve the experience for developers and users.

data.title: Zcash Foundation Outlines Strategic Priorities for 2026
data.description: The Zcash Foundation has unveiled its strategic priorities for 2026. According to Foresight News, the foundation aims to enhance the performance of its Zebra consensus node, complete the NU7 ZIP implementation, and advance the Z3 technology stack to replace zcashd. Additionally, the foundation plans to continue developing the FROST threshold signature scheme by releasing version 3, finalizing ZIP-312, and introducing a distributed key generation protocol. Furthermore, the foundation is committed to promoting a "privacy by default" digital cash assistance model and exploring identity solutions based on zero-knowledge proofs, striving to balance compliance, accountability, and privacy protection.

data.title: Hyperliquid's HIP-3 DEX Sees Surge in Open Interest
data.description:
Hyperliquid's HIP-3 decentralized exchange (DEX) has experienced a significant increase in open interest, surpassing $925 million. According to ChainCatcher, this marks an increase from the nearly $790 million record set on Monday. CoinGlass data indicates that Hyperliquid's total open interest is currently around $7.8 billion.

Additionally, the HYPE token has seen a rise of approximately 50% over the past three days, with its current trading price nearing $35.

data.title: Liquid Bitcoin's Collateralization Issue Resolved Swiftly
data.description: A temporary issue with the Liquid Bitcoin (LBTC) dashboard showed undercollateralization due to outdated node software and incomplete visibility of federated wallets. According to NS3.AI, Adam Back, CEO of Blockstream and a member of the Liquid Network, confirmed that the problem was quickly resolved and that LBTC remains fully backed 1:1 with Bitcoin. The error occurred because old addresses were mistakenly counted, resulting in a temporary display of only 82.4% backing. However, independent dashboards have verified that full collateralization is maintained.

data.title: Bitcoin Realized Loss Spike Proves False as Market Activity Remains Thin
data.description:
Bitcoin is trading around $90,000 at the time of writing, following a period of elevated realized losses that initially appeared to signal renewed short-term holder (STH) capitulation. However, on-chain data shows that the recent spike in realized losses was not driven by distribution, but by internal UTXO consolidation, distorting several commonly used STH indicators.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-realized-loss-spike-proves-false-as-market-activity-remains-thin/

data.title: S&P 500 Index Reaches 7,000 Points, Marking Significant Milestone
data.description: The S&P 500 index has reached the 7,000-point mark for the first time, signaling a breakthrough of a significant psychological barrier. According to ChainCatcher, this milestone reflects the ongoing strength and resilience of the market. The achievement underscores investor confidence and the positive momentum within the financial sector. This development is seen as a key indicator of economic health and market stability.

data.title: Strive increased its holdings by 333.89 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to approximately $1.18 billion.
data.description: Strive, a US-listed Bitcoin crypto treasury company, disclosed that it has completed the issuance and oversubscription of SATA shares, and simultaneously completed the exchange of Semler notes. The company purchased 333.89 bitcoins at an average price of $89,851, and now holds 13,131.82 bitcoins, making Strive the tenth largest corporate Bitcoin holder globally.

data.title: The market capitalization of BSC ecosystem meme token "Binance 2017" has exceeded $10 million, with a daily increase of 40%.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the top-ranked address on Binance 2017 for Meme coin, ending in 1c05, was created two days ago and received $300,000. It has been continuously buying and currently has a floating profit of $120,000.
